global.description: The ad features a modern blue background with promotional text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Blue abstract background
elements.description: A smooth blue background with abstract shapes creating a modern and clean look.

elements.label: RouteBloon logo
elements.description: The logo features bold, uppercase letters in a prominent position at the top, designed to be eye-catching.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center containing key promotional text, visually distinct and inviting attention.

elements.label: Top left shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the top left corner, adding visual interest without distracting from the main message.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with clear text inviting users to take action, designed to stand out.

elements.label: Center shape
elements.description: A small circular shape in the center, serving as a decorative element without specific meaning.

elements.label: Savings headline
elements.description: Bold text in the center that reads 'Last-minute savings', designed to grab attention immediately.

elements.label: Special fares text
elements.description: Text below the headline that provides additional information about the offer, clear and easy to read.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent display of the price '€9.99' positioned at the bottom, designed to attract attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, clean and modern, RouteBloon logo, last-minute savings.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, followed by body text, and the CTA button is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, Special fares today, RouteBloon, €9.99, Learn more
